title: Vantage Orchestrator Run State
description: Single source of truth for one orchestrator run. Updated after every dispatch and every gate. Makes a run resumable across sessions.

autonomy.description: Execution autonomy dial: how the orchestrator moves through waves.

external_tier.description: Blast radius on the real world. Inherits the operator's permissions file if present; otherwise defaults to Tier 1.

budget.description: Run-level stop conditions. Prevents an autonomous run from looping or fanning out without bound.

max_total_dispatches.description: Hard ceiling on total agent dispatches across the run. Default 30.

max_iterate_loops.description: Hard ceiling on test-to-iterate cycles. Default 3.

dispatch_mode.description: How this wave's dispatches were emitted. single = one dispatch. parallel = multiple dispatches emitted in ONE assistant message (correct). serial = multiple dispatches emitted across separate messages, which silently loses the wave's parallelism and is an execution defect to flag in the retrospective.

dependency_reason.description: why this is in this wave / what it depends on

gate.description: The auditor pass for this wave.

verdict.description: Build and ideation gates use PASS/WARN/BLOCK. The test-wave synthesis uses SHIP/ITERATE/BLOCK: SHIP = no blocking issues, ITERATE = route fixes and re-test (the expected iterate path, distinct from a failed BLOCK).

escalations_for_operator.description: Safety-floor or tier items the orchestrator surfaced for the operator to act on themselves.

learning.description: Self-improvement bookkeeping for this run: which prior lessons were reapplied at startup, and what this run produced for the cross-run ledger at retrospect. See references/self-improvement.md.

lessons_applied.description: Lesson ids pulled from the ledger and injected into this run's plan or briefs at startup.

lessons_written.description: Lesson ids created or strengthened by this run's retrospective.

proposals_written.description: Paths to engine-improvement proposals raised by this run's retrospective. Staged, not applied.

retrospective_path.description: Path to retrospective.md in this run directory.
